Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Fire Insurance Exchange'S Employee Doren Hohl, To Attend Depositions; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Bruce W. Blakely, Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party
Edward Donohue, Esq., for Defendant/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Patrick Kenny's Motion To Compel Defendant Fire Insurance Exchange's Employee, Doren Hohl, To Attend Deposition is denied as the deposition was improperly noticed for a location that is not within 75 miles of the deponent's residence.
The objection to the Bibel declaration is sustained as the declaration is irrelevant.
The objections to the Blakely declaration are overruled.

SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
